name: Mushroom Beef Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine beef, bread crumbs, milk, Worcestershire sauce, 1/2 teaspoon salt, pepper, and garlic powder; mix well.
2. Shape into 3 or 4 oval patties; cook on both sides until no longer pink.
3. Cook the mushrooms and basil in 2 tablespoons butter over medium-high heat until tender.
4. Increase heat to high; cook and stir until most of the liquid evaporates.
5. Melt the remaining butter; stir in flour.
6. Gradually blend in half and half, water, hot pepper sauce, and remaining salt.
7. Cook and stir on low until thickened and bubbly.
8. Cook and stir for 2 minutes more.
9. Add enough remaining water to make a medium-thin sauce.
10. Add mushrooms; heat through.
11. Serve over beef patties; top with cheese and onions.
Yield: 3-4 servings.
